# Frontguard

> AI-powered frontend visual regression testing for web teams — detect, understand, and fix visual bugs before they ship to production.

Frontguard is an open-source CLI + cloud platform. The CLI is MIT-licensed and free forever. The hosted cloud (team baselines, history, flake-score badges) is the paid tier at $29/month per user.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://frontguard.dev/) — Product overview, install paths, comparison vs Percy / Chromatic / Argos
- [Pricing](https://frontguard.dev/pricing) — Free CLI ($0, MIT), Pro ($29/mo), Team/Enterprise; compare-plans matrix and the 8-question FAQ
- [Comparisons](https://frontguard.dev/comparisons) — Capability-by-capability vs Percy, Chromatic, BackstopJS, Lost Pixel, Argos, with sources
- [Changelog](https://frontguard.dev/changelog) — Notable releases, newest first (Keep a Changelog)
- [Brand](https://frontguard.dev/brand) — The amber shield mark, lockups, color tokens, typography, voice
- [Docs](https://frontguard.dev/docs) — Install, CLI, configuration, AI analysis, CI/CD, self-hosting (37 articles at `/docs/<slug>`)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ravidsrk/frontguard) — Source code, issues, contributing
- [npm: @frontguard/cli](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@frontguard/cli) — CLI package
- [npm: @frontguard/playwright](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@frontguard/playwright) — Playwright plugin
- [Validation results](https://github.com/ravidsrk/frontguard/blob/main/validation/results-v0.2.md) — Real-repo AI accuracy harness

## For Agents

- [Agent task routing](https://frontguard.dev/agents.md) — Start here for MCP tools, cloud API routes, auth, limits, and safe task ordering
- [OpenAPI contract](https://frontguard.dev/openapi.json) — Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 contract for the hosted cloud API at `https://api.frontguard.dev`
- [MCP discovery manifest](https://frontguard.dev/.well-known/mcp.json) — Discovery for `@frontguard/mcp`; configure `FRONTGUARD_API_URL=https://api.frontguard.dev`

## What Frontguard Does

- Anti-flake consensus — three captures per route, majority wins; SSIM perceptual matching as fallback
- AI classification — diff goes to GPT-4o or Claude Sonnet with DOM + axe-core findings inline; returns category + confidence + cause
- Sandbox-verified fixes — every AI patch is applied in a local Playwright sandbox (or Daytona snapshot), re-rendered, and only shipped if the diff clears
- Plugin architecture — six lifecycle hooks; built-ins for accessibility (axe-core), Figma compare, perf budgets, monitor, third-party-script drift
- CI-native — composite GitHub Action, PR comment with baseline / current / diff thumbnails; GitLab CI, CircleCI, Jenkins via the same CLI
- Self-hostable — Cloudflare Workers + D1 + R2, or docker-compose on your laptop with miniflare + SQLite + local-disk adapters

## Install

```
npm install @frontguard/cli
npx -p @frontguard/cli frontguard init
npx -p @frontguard/cli frontguard run --url http://localhost:3000
```

Playwright plugin:

```
npm install -D @frontguard/cli @frontguard/playwright
```

GitHub Action:

```
- uses: ravidsrk/frontguard@v0
  with:
    url: ${{ steps.preview.outputs.url }}
  env:
    FRONTGUARD_OPENAI_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_KEY }}
```
